title: IOC Manager Plugin Configuration
description: Schema for config.yaml files used by iocmng tasks and jobs. Place this alongside the Python module in the plugin git repository.

prefix.description: Optional task-level PV prefix segment. Combined with the beamline controller global prefix as {CONTROLLER_PREFIX}:{TASK_PREFIX}:{PV_NAME}. If omitted, the plugin name (uppercased) is used as the prefix segment.

parameters.description: Key-value pairs passed to the task/job constructor. REST API parameters override these at runtime.

mode.description: Task execution mode. 'continuous' runs execute() in a loop; 'triggered' waits for RUN PV; 'reactive' fires on_input_changed() when monitored wired inputs change.

additionalProperties.description: Application-specific parameters. Values can be scalars (string, number, boolean) or arrays of scalars.

pvs.description: PV definitions created automatically by the soft IOC. Divided into inputs (writable) and outputs (read-only).

inputs.description: PVs that external clients can write to (aOut, stringOut, boolOut, longOut). Inputs can optionally be *wired* to an external PV via the 'link' field.

outputs.description: PVs that the task/job writes to (aIn, stringIn, boolIn, longIn).

arguments.description: Preferred alias for 'pvs'. PV definitions divided into inputs and outputs.

inputs.description: PVs writable by external clients or wired to external PVs.

outputs.description: PVs that the task/job writes to.

rules.description: Declarative logic rules evaluated each cycle against wired input values. When a rule condition is true, the framework fires actuators (writes to wired inputs) and sets outputs.

pvGroup.description: Map of PV names to their definitions.

pvFloat.description: Analog (float) PV — maps to softioc aOut (input) or aIn (output).

pvInt.description: Integer PV — maps to softioc longOut (input) or longIn (output).

pvString.description: String PV — maps to softioc stringOut (input) or stringIn (output).

pvBool.description: Boolean PV — maps to softioc boolOut (input) or boolIn (output).

linkProperties.description: Shared link field definitions for wired inputs.

link.description: External PV name to wire this input to. When set, the framework automatically reads the PV and populates the local record.

link_mode.description: 'poll' reads the PV once per cycle; 'monitor' attaches a persistent subscription.

poll_rate.description: Per-input poll rate in seconds. Defaults to the task interval. Only used with link_mode=poll.

trigger.description: If true, a value change fires on_input_changed(). In reactive mode, also triggers rule evaluation.

ruleDefinition.description: Declarative logic rule. Condition is a safe expression over input keys. When true, actuators write values to wired inputs and outputs set local PVs.

condition.description: Safe expression evaluated over current input values. Supports comparisons (==, !=, <, >, <=, >=), boolean logic (and, or, not), and arithmetic (+, -, *, /).

message.description: Log message emitted when the rule fires.

actuators.description: Map of input keys to values to write to their linked external PVs.

outputs.description: Map of output PV names to values to set on the local soft IOC.
